channel.title: Openai on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Openai on Arrans github.io

item.title: infiniflow/ragflow
item.description: RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs

item.title: microsoft/markitdown
item.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

item.title: open-webui/open-webui
item.description: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, …)

item.title: f/prompts.chat
item.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

item.title: vllm-project/vllm
item.description: A high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs

item.title: OpenHands/OpenHands
item.description: 🙌 OpenHands: AI-Driven Development

item.title: microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners
item.description: 21 Lessons, Get Started Building with Generative AI

item.title: openai/openai-cookbook
item.description: Examples and guides for using the OpenAI API

item.title: Nano-Collective/nanocoder
item.description: A beautiful local-first coding agent running in your terminal - built by the community for the community ⚒

item.title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT
item.description: AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.

item.title: danny-avila/LibreChat
item.description: Enhanced ChatGPT Clone: Features Agents, MCP, DeepSeek, Anthropic, AWS, OpenAI, Responses API, Azure, Groq, o1, GPT-5, Mistral, OpenRouter, Vertex AI, Gemini, Artifacts, AI model switching, message search, Code Interpreter, langchain, DALL-E-3, OpenAPI Actions, Functions, Secure Multi-User Auth, Presets, open-source for self-hosting. Active.

item.title: BerriAI/litellm
item.description: Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]

item.title: router-for-me/CLIProxyAPI
item.description: Wrap Gemini CLI, Antigravity, ChatGPT Codex, Claude Code, Qwen Code, iFlow as an OpenAI/Gemini/Claude/Codex compatible API service, allowing you to enjoy the free Gemini 2.5 Pro, GPT 5, Claude, Qwen model through API

item.title: langchain-ai/langchain
item.description: The agent engineering platform

item.title: SYSTRAN/faster-whisper
item.description: Faster Whisper transcription with CTranslate2

item.title: collabora/WhisperLive
item.description: A nearly-live implementation of OpenAI’s Whisper.

item.title: lobehub/lobehub
item.description: The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.

item.title: lencx/ChatGPT
item.description: 🔮 ChatGPT Desktop Application (Mac, Windows and Linux)

item.title: blinkospace/blinko
item.description: An open-source, self-hosted personal AI note tool prioritizing privacy, built using TypeScript .

item.title: clidey/whodb
item.description: A lightweight next-gen data explorer - Postgres, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis, MariaDB, Elastic Search, and Clickhouse with Chat interface

item.title: Aider-AI/aider
item.description: aider is AI pair programming in your terminal

item.title: getumbrel/llama-gpt
item.description: A self-hosted, offline, ChatGPT-like chatbot. Powered by Llama 2. 100% private, with no data leaving your device. New: Code Llama support!

item.title: sigoden/aichat
item.description: All-in-one LLM CLI tool featuring Shell Assistant, Chat-REPL, RAG, AI Tools & Agents, with access to OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Ollama, Groq, and more.

item.title: dbeaver/dbeaver
item.description: Free universal database tool and SQL client

item.title: microsoft/semantic-kernel
item.description: Integrate cutting-edge LLM technology quickly and easily into your apps

item.title: sashabaranov/go-openai
item.description: OpenAI ChatGPT, GPT-5, GPT-Image-1, Whisper API clients for Go

item.title: Mobile-Artificial-Intelligence/maid
item.description: Maid is a free and open source application for interfacing with llama.cpp models locally, and with Anthropic, DeepSeek, Ollama, Mistral and OpenAI models remotely.

item.title: promptslab/Awesome-Prompt-Engineering
item.description: This repository contains a hand-curated resources for Prompt Engineering with a focus on Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT), ChatGPT, PaLM etc

item.title: modfin/bellman
item.description: Golang lib for LLM APIs, ChatGPT, Gemini and Anthropic

item.title: FireCubeStudios/Clippy
item.description: Bring back Clippy on Windows 10/11!

item.title: laurentkempe/aspirePlayground
item.description: Some experiments around .NET Aspire to learn.

item.title: lollipopkit/flutter_gpt_box
item.description: GPTBox - a third-party client for OpenAI API.

item.title: BandarLabs/gitpodcast
item.description: Convert any git repository into an engaging podcast
